objects.name: Scarecrow
objects.description: A solemn scarecrow awaiting ceremonial fashion.

objects.name: Cult Bucket
objects.description: An overturned bucket serving as an altar of alarming sincerity.

objects.name: Hay Pile
objects.description: A fragrant hay pile with suspiciously plaid implications.

objects.name: Barn Tools
objects.description: A collection of tools trying their best to stay out of prophecy.

objects.name: Hay Bale
objects.description: A tightly packed hay bale radiating rural confidence.

objects.name: Fence Post
objects.description: A weathered fence post. It has seen things.

objects.name: Windmill
objects.description: An old windmill whose wooden teeth mutter into the breeze.

objects.name: Windmill Ladder
objects.description: A narrow ladder leading upward toward a hat and questionable decision-making.

objects.name: Nest Boxes
objects.description: A row of nest boxes filled with straw and competitive gossip.

objects.name: Feather Pile
objects.description: A fluffy little heap of evidence.

objects.name: Garden Rows
objects.description: Vegetable rows arranged with considerably more dignity than the cult.

objects.name: Watering Can
objects.description: A dented watering can. Even it seems nervous around the rabbit.

objects.name: Glove Hook
objects.description: A hook holding the farmer's leather gloves under feline supervision.

objects.name: Porch Chair
objects.description: A chair suitable for rocking and judgment.

items.name: Straw Hat
items.description: A sacred straw hat of the Tall One.

items.name: Leather Gloves
items.description: Work gloves of legendary agricultural significance.

items.name: Plaid Shirt
items.description: A plaid shirt that radiates rustic destiny.

scripts.name: enter_farmyard
scripts.description: First-visit introduction to the sacred errand.

elseSteps.text: A small farm in the French countryside. Somehow, this is where destiny has cornered me.
Russ Toire! The scarecrow awaits the Vestments of Plenty!
I joined a barnyard cult for this?

scripts.name: look_old_hen
scripts.body: ctx.say('Old Hen radiates the grave authority of someone who has mistaken a bucket for an altar.');

scripts.name: look_duck
scripts.body: ctx.say('A duck posing like a prophet of the pond.');

scripts.name: look_goat
scripts.body: ctx.say('A sleepy goat whose commitment to comfort borders on theology.');

scripts.name: look_hens
scripts.body: ctx.say('A cluster of hens vibrating faintly with gossip.');

scripts.name: look_rabbit
scripts.body: ctx.say('A nervous rabbit scanning for threats, curses, and porch accessories.');

scripts.name: look_cat
scripts.body: ctx.say('A cat with the effortless confidence of a creature who has never apologized once.');

scripts.name: npc_fallback
scripts.body: ctx.say('That does not seem like the sort of thing polite barnyard society encourages.');

scripts.name: global_fallback
scripts.body: ctx.say('Russ considers that carefully, then decides it is probably not central to the prophecy.');

scripts.name: scarecrow_fallback
scripts.body: ctx.say('If the scarecrow is to be persuaded, clothing is clearly the diplomatic route.');

scripts.name: start_quest
scripts.body: if (ctx.getFlag('quest_started')) { return; } ctx.setFlag('quest_started', true); ctx.say('You have been entrusted with recovering the sacred wardrobe of the Farmer. This feels less heroic than advertised.');

scripts.name: look_scarecrow
scripts.body: const stage = ctx.state.getObjectState('scarecrow', 'dress_stage') || 0; if (stage === 0) { ctx.say('A solemn scarecrow stands bare of ceremony, awaiting the Vestments of Plenty.'); } else if (stage === 1) { ctx.say('The scarecrow now wears the sacred hat. It looks mildly supervisory.'); } else if (stage === 2) { ctx.say('The scarecrow now wears hat and shirt. It has become alarmingly official.'); } else { ctx.say('The scarecrow is fully vested in barnyard glory.'); }

scripts.name: place_hat_on_scarecrow
scripts.body: if (ctx.getFlag('hat_on_scarecrow')) { ctx.say('The straw hat is already perched there with stern agricultural dignity.'); return; } ctx.removeItem('russ_toire', 'straw_hat'); ctx.setFlag('hat_on_scarecrow', true); ctx.state.setObjectState('scarecrow', 'dress_stage', 1); ctx.say('Russ flips the straw hat onto the scarecrow. It instantly looks much more qualified to supervise corn.');

scripts.name: place_shirt_on_scarecrow
scripts.body: if (ctx.getFlag('shirt_on_scarecrow')) { ctx.say('The plaid shirt is already in place, gloriously rustic.'); return; } ctx.removeItem('russ_toire', 'plaid_shirt'); ctx.setFlag('shirt_on_scarecrow', true); const stage = ctx.getFlag('hat_on_scarecrow') ? 2 : 1; ctx.state.setObjectState('scarecrow', 'dress_stage', stage); ctx.say('Russ drapes the plaid shirt over the scarecrow. The ritual suddenly feels alarmingly real.');

scripts.name: place_gloves_on_scarecrow
scripts.body: if (ctx.getFlag('gloves_on_scarecrow')) { ctx.say('The leather gloves are already in place, projecting unmistakable authority.'); return; } ctx.removeItem('russ_toire', 'leather_gloves'); ctx.setFlag('gloves_on_scarecrow', true); const stage = (ctx.getFlag('hat_on_scarecrow') && ctx.getFlag('shirt_on_scarecrow')) ? 3 : (ctx.getFlag('hat_on_scarecrow') || ctx.getFlag('shirt_on_scarecrow')) ? 2 : 1; ctx.state.setObjectState('scarecrow', 'dress_stage', stage); ctx.say('Russ fits the gloves onto the scarecrow\'s stick hands. The ensemble is now only mildly unsettling.');

scripts.name: look_cult_bucket
scripts.body: ctx.say('An overturned bucket used as a ceremonial altar. Mysticism, apparently, can be very affordable.');

scripts.name: look_hay_pile
scripts.body: ctx.say('A generous heap of hay. Something in there is either hidden treasure or an allergy.');

scripts.name: search_hay_pile
scripts.body: if (ctx.getFlag('found_plaid_shirt')) { ctx.say('Russ rummages through the hay again and discovers only more hay. The hay remains committed to the bit.'); return; } ctx.setFlag('found_plaid_shirt', true); ctx.giveItem('russ_toire', 'plaid_shirt'); ctx.say('Russ pecks and scratches through the hay until a plaid shirt emerges, gloriously dusty and unexpectedly sacred.');

scripts.name: look_windmill
scripts.body: if (ctx.getFlag('retrieved_hat')) { ctx.say('The windmill turns on, no longer burdened by hat-related theology.'); } else { ctx.say('The windmill creaks against the sky. Somewhere up there, destiny is wearing straw.'); }

scripts.name: look_windmill_ladder
scripts.body: ctx.say('A ladder climbs the windmill. Somewhere above waits a hat and a regrettable amount of symbolism.');

scripts.name: climb_windmill_ladder
scripts.body: if (ctx.getFlag('retrieved_hat')) { ctx.say('Russ climbs up again, but there is nothing left to recover except perspective.'); return; } ctx.setFlag('retrieved_hat', true); ctx.giveItem('russ_toire', 'straw_hat'); ctx.say('Russ flutters and scrambles up the ladder, wrestles the straw hat free, and returns feeling absurdly heroic.');

scripts.name: look_glove_hook
scripts.body: if (ctx.getFlag('found_gloves')) { ctx.say('The hook is empty. The sacred hand-coverings have been claimed.'); return; } ctx.say('A porch hook holds the farmer\'s leather gloves. The cat appears to have annexed them.');

scripts.name: pickup_gloves
scripts.body: if (!ctx.getFlag('cat_distracted')) { ctx.say('The cat glides neatly into your way and informs you, without words, that the gloves are under feline protection.'); return; } if (ctx.getFlag('found_gloves')) { ctx.say('The hook is empty. You already took the gloves.'); return; } ctx.setFlag('found_gloves', true); ctx.giveItem('russ_toire', 'leather_gloves'); ctx.say('Russ hops up and claims the leather gloves. The cat allows it purely because the ritual amuses it.');

scripts.name: look_nest_boxes
scripts.body: ctx.say('Nest boxes full of straw, feathers, and secrets no one intends to keep.');

scripts.name: look_straw_hat
scripts.body: ctx.say('A crisp straw hat with exactly the amount of gravitas this ceremony requires.');

scripts.name: look_leather_gloves
scripts.body: ctx.say('A pair of worn leather gloves. They smell faintly of work and destiny.');

scripts.name: look_plaid_shirt
scripts.body: ctx.say('A plaid shirt of immense rustic symbolism.');

scripts.name: final_ceremony
scripts.description: Triggered once the scarecrow is fully dressed.

elseSteps.text: The Vestments of Plenty are restored! The ancient barnyard covenant is renewed!
I knew the gloves were cursed!
We dressed a scarecrow in stolen laundry.
And yet—behold how majestic he is.
The barnyard erupts in triumphant chanting as the fully dressed scarecrow presides over the most ridiculous ritual in the French countryside.

nodes.speaker: old_hen
nodes.text: Russ Toire, chosen beak of the barnyard, the scarecrow stands naked before destiny.

nodes.speaker: old_hen
nodes.text: The Vestments of Plenty must be restored: the straw hat, the leather gloves, and the plaid shirt.

branches.text: What am I looking for again?
Why are we dressing a scarecrow?
I will continue the sacred errand.

nodes.speaker: old_hen
nodes.text: The Vestments gather. The scarecrow stirs in spirit.

nodes.speaker: old_hen
nodes.text: The covenant is renewed. The field shall know bounty. Or at least respectable scarecrow tailoring.

nodes.speaker: old_hen
nodes.text: The straw hat, the leather gloves, and the plaid shirt. These are the Vestments of Plenty.

nodes.speaker: old_hen
nodes.text: Because tradition demands it, and because last year we tried chanting at a rake and nothing improved.

nodes.speaker: old_hen
nodes.text: Whatever is not yet upon the scarecrow remains missing. Destiny is frustratingly literal.

nodes.speaker: goat
nodes.text: If this is about chores, I have already devoted myself to the spiritual practice of lying down.

nodes.speaker: goat
nodes.text: The barn contains hay, dust, and a deeply comforting plaid mystery.

nodes.speaker: goat
nodes.text: I miss my plaid blanket. It supported me emotionally.

nodes.speaker: goat
nodes.text: There was something plaid in the hay pile. I sat on it for several hours in a spirit of mutual understanding.

nodes.speaker: hens
nodes.text: Cluck-cluck-cluck! Russ, have you heard? No, of course not. That is why we are here.

nodes.speaker: hens
nodes.text: We know things. We repeat them loudly. It is a gift.

branches.text: Tell me about the plaid shirt.

nodes.speaker: hens
nodes.text: The plaid has been recovered! We expect at least three rounds of ceremonial gossip.

nodes.speaker: hens
nodes.text: The goat sat on something plaid in the barn! He called it a pillow. We called it scandalous.

nodes.speaker: rabbit
nodes.text: Quiet! The vegetables are listening. And the gloves. The gloves are definitely listening.

nodes.speaker: rabbit
nodes.text: Knowledge is dangerous. So are porch accessories.

nodes.speaker: rabbit
nodes.text: You took the gloves? Good. They were probably cursed. Or damp. Possibly both.

nodes.speaker: rabbit
nodes.text: On the farmhouse porch! Hanging from a hook like cursed little hand ghosts! There is also a cat, which somehow makes it worse.

nodes.speaker: cat
nodes.text: Yes, I am guarding the gloves. No, I was not asked to. Standards must be maintained.

nodes.speaker: cat
nodes.text: Go on, then. Impress me.

branches.text: I need the gloves for a sacred scarecrow ceremony.
I will leave you to your porch empire.

nodes.speaker: cat
nodes.text: I still cannot believe you dressed a scarecrow for spiritual reasons. Rural life continues to exceed my expectations.

nodes.speaker: cat
nodes.text: A chicken in a cult dressing a scarecrow? That is the funniest thing I have heard all week. Fine. Take them.

nodes.speaker: duck
nodes.text: The wind turns, the hill watches, and the wooden teeth whisper to the worthy.

nodes.speaker: duck
nodes.text: I have consulted the breeze. It was vague, but dramatic.

nodes.speaker: duck
nodes.text: You have climbed, reclaimed, and returned. The wind acknowledges your absurd courage.

nodes.speaker: duck
nodes.text: The sacred hat waits where the wind whistles through wooden teeth. Climb, and reclaim what the sky has borrowed.
